characters.name: Henry
characters.description: Henry is a minor character inCall Me Katand love interest ofPhil. Henry was first mentioned inEggsbyPhilwho said that they had met on a dating app for senior gay christian men. WhenCarterlearns that Phil bought him hearing aids he thinks that Phil is being cat-fished and sets up a real-life meeting with between the two at the bar. When Phil learns this he become extremely worried, as he used a picture ofMaxinstead of himself, which would make him the cat-fisher. Phil then decides to not meet up with Henry.

characters.name: Kat
characters.description: KatBiological informationFull nameKatherine Edith SilverGenderFemaleBornOctober 4 1977Age45Resides inLouisville, KentuckyOccupationOwner ofCat CafeRelationshipsFamilySheila Sliver(Mother)Unbown Baby (son/daughter)FriendsTara Barnett(Best Friend)Max(Good Friend)Randi(Friend)Phil(Friend; deceased)Love interestsMax(boyfriend)AppearancesFirst appearancePlus OneLast appearanceCall Me A Donut WallPortrayed byMayim BialikKatherine Edith "Kat" Silver PhD: is the main protagonist onCall Me Kat. She is portrayed byMayim Bialik. Unbown Baby (son/daughter)  Kat is a silly person, with a wide variety of odd behaviors and interests, including her fascination with track announcing. It is important to note that she is very confident in herself, this is shown in her conversation with Max in episode one in which she states that in spite of her classmates' dislike of her playing in the piano at night in college she still did.

characters.name: Mary Jane
characters.description: Mary Jane is aPhil's mother and a minor character inCall Me Kat.  Philsays that his mother is in so much pain she can't even clip her own toenails so he had to do it. He tellsKatthat the doctor thinks that the only thing that might help is medicinal marjauna.

characters.name: Tara Barnett
characters.description:
Tara BarnettBiological informationFull nameTara BarnettGenderFemaleResides inLouisville, KentuckyRelationshipsFriendsKat(Best Friend)AppearancesFirst appearancePlus OnePortrayed byVanessa LacheyTara Barnettis a recurring character onCall Me Kat. She is portrayed byVanessa Lachey. Tara Barnett is described as being similar to Kat's mother,Kateven goes so far to say she is the daughter hermotheralways wanted to have. •Tara had a cesarean section surgery and before she was allowed to eat after surgery, she had Kat sneak a rotisserie chicken into the hospital for her
•She and her husband have three children
•She planned her future wedding since she was 8 years old, and then it rained on her wedding day. Tara Barnett is described as being similar to Kat's mother,Kateven goes so far to say she is the daughter hermotheralways wanted to have.
characters.personality_section: Tara Barnett is described as being similar to Kat's mother,Kateven goes so far to say she is the daughter hermotheralways wanted to have.
